Skip to main content

API Documentation

Build powerful audio processing workflows with the AI Mixer Pro API. Access stems, process tracks, and manage subscriptions programmatically.

Authentication

All API requests require authentication using Clerk. Include your session token in the Authorization header:

Authorization: Bearer your_clerk_session_token

Authentication

All API requests require authentication via Clerk. Include the Clerk session token in the Authorization header.

GET/api/tracks

Retrieve all tracks for the authenticated user

Request
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://yourapp.com/api/tracks
Response
{
  "tracks": [
    {
      "id": "track_abc123",
      "name": "My Track.wav",
      "status": "COMPLETED",
      "progress": 100,
      "stemCount": 4,
      "createdAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"
    }
  ]
}

Uploads

Upload audio files for processing

POST/api/upload

Upload a new audio file

Request
curl -X POST -F "file=@track.wav" https://yourapp.com/api/upload
Response
{
  "track": {
    "id": "track_abc123",
    "name": "track.wav",
    "status": "UPLOADED"
  }
}

Processing

Start and monitor audio processing

POST/api/process

Start processing a track

Request
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"trackId":"track_abc123"}' https://yourapp.com/api/process
Response
{
  "success": true,
  "jobId": "job_xyz789",
  "track": {
    "id": "track_abc123",
    "status": "PROCESSING"
  }
}
POST/api/batch

Process multiple tracks at once

Request
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"trackIds":["track_1","track_2","track_3"]}' https://yourapp.com/api/batch
Response
{
  "message": "Queued 3 of 3 tracks for processing",
  "results": [
    { "trackId": "track_1", "status": "queued" },
    { "trackId": "track_2", "status": "queued" },
    { "trackId": "track_3", "status": "queued" }
  ],
  "summary": { "total": 3, "queued": 3, "failed": 0, "skipped": 0 }
}

Export

Download processed audio and stems

POST/api/export

Generate download URL for stems

Request
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"trackId":"track_abc123","stemType":"all"}' https://yourapp.com/api/export
Response
{
  "downloadUrl": "/api/download?file=track_abc123/stems.zip",
  "fileName": "My Track-stems.zip"
}

Billing

Manage subscriptions and payments

POST/api/stripe/checkout

Create a checkout session

Request
curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"plan":"pro"}' https://yourapp.com/api/stripe/checkout
Response
{
  "url": "https://checkout.stripe.com/..."
}
POST/api/stripe/portal

Open customer portal for subscription management

Request
curl -X POST https://yourapp.com/api/stripe/portal
Response
{
  "url": "https://billing.stripe.com/..."
}

Rate Limits

Free Plan

10 requests/minute
50 tracks/month

Pro Plan

100 requests/minute
Unlimited tracks

Studio Plan

500 requests/minute
Priority processing
